---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Get in touch

I'm always open to conversations about credit risk, fintech, data analytics, or potential opportunities. Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.

::: {.callout-note title="{{< fa briefcase >}} Currently open to opportunities"}
I am actively looking for **internships and graduate roles** in risk analytics, credit risk, or data science at fintechs and financial institutions in Ireland and the UK. My availability is from **Summer 2026**.
:::

---

## Contact information

| Channel | Details |
|---------|---------|
| {{< fa envelope >}} Email | wendy.m.lucio@gmail.com |
| {{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn | [linkedin.com/in/wendymlp](https://www.linkedin.com/in/wendymlp){target="_blank"} |
| {{< fa brands github >}} GitHub | [github.com/WendyLucio](https://github.com/WendyLucio){target="_blank"} |
| {{< fa location-dot >}} Location | Dublin, Ireland |

---

## References

Available upon request. I have professional references from:

- **Banorte** — Senior leadership in the Credit Risk division
- **Scotiabank Mexico** — Risk management team
- **DCU** — Academic supervisor, MSc Business Analytics

---

## Let's connect

Whether you want to discuss a project, explore a collaboration, or just talk about the future of credit risk in fintech — I'd love to hear from you.
